name: 14"x20" Lumbar Square Outdoor Throw Pillow Black - Threshold™
description:
Add modern style to your outdoor seating arrangement with this Lumbar Outdoor Throw Pillow from Threshold™. Designed in black detailing on a white background, this lumbar pillow offers supportive cushioning that’s perfect for patio chairs, loungers or benches. The woven, recycled polyester fabric brings a soft feel, while its fade-resistant construction helps maintain long-lasting color. Finished with a convenient zip closure, this throw pillow provides a polished touch to any outdoor living space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
